subject: How to access WitchDance on any mobile device
body:
## Option 1 — Local network (same Wi-Fi)

All devices must be on the same Wi-Fi as your dev machine.

```
npm run dev -- --host
```

Vite prints a Network URL like `http://192.168.4.28:5173/` — open that on any phone/tablet on the same Wi-Fi. Works immediately. They can also "Add to Home Screen" to install as a PWA.

**Limitation:** only works while your PC is on and running the dev server.

---

## Option 2 — GitHub Pages (anywhere, free, permanent)

1. Push repo to GitHub
2. `npm install --save-dev gh-pages`
3. Add to `package.json` scripts: `"deploy": "gh-pages -d dist"`
4. `npm run build && npm run deploy`
5. GitHub repo → Settings → Pages → set source branch to `gh-pages`

You'll get a URL like `https://yourusername.github.io/WitchDance/` — works on any device, no server needed.

**Note:** You may need to add `base: '/WitchDance/'` to `vite.config.ts` if the app is served from a subdirectory.

---

**Recommendation:** Use Option 1 for quick local testing today. Use Option 2 when you want a permanent shareable link.
